Paragraph.Sentence: Extend the sequence to the fifth step, giving the value for A.

response.feedback: The student got this item correct.
Sorry, that's not right. The terms in the sequence are 1, 5, 11, 19, and 29 (the correct answer). Check out the pattern of differences between all pairs of numbers.
Student seems to have generated the next odd number.
